title: Requirement
description: A single normalized requirement (functional or non-functional) extracted from project input. IDs follow the FR-/NFR- scheme from governance.md.

id.description: Stable identifier. FR- for functional, NFR- for non-functional.

kind.description: Requirement family. Must agree with the id prefix (functional => FR-, non_functional => NFR-).

statement.description: Verbatim or near-verbatim requirement as understood from the input.

normalized.description: Crisp restatement of the requirement in a single testable sentence, keeping the original in `statement`.

source.description: Provenance: a quoted span or the named input section this requirement was extracted from. Mandatory for G-REQ-SRC.
source.$comment: Never drop provenance to tidy the output (see intake.md).

priority.description: Scope priority. MVP = required for the minimum viable product; Full = part of the full target only.

rationale.description: Why this requirement exists / the underlying need.

acceptance_hint.description: Optional pointer to how this would be verified, before full acceptance criteria exist.

merged_from.description: IDs of duplicate requirements merged into this one during de-duplication.

links.description: Typed cross-references to other entities. Targets are entity IDs.

decisions.description: Decisions (DEC-/ADR-) that shape how this requirement is met.
